label: frontier • build a tested Python CLI end to end and deliver it
query: Build a small Python CLI tool in this folder. Requirements: (1) create calc.py using argparse with two subcommands — 'add A B' prints the integer sum of A and B, 'mul A B' prints the integer product — printing ONLY the number; (2) create test_calc.py with unittest tests covering both subcommands; (3) run the tests with 'python3 -m unittest discover -q' and make sure they pass before finishing; (4) track your work with a todo list and update it as you go; (5) when everything is green, share calc.py with me as an artifact.
notes: Frontier full-loop discipline: plan (todo), build, self-verify (tests must actually run green), deliver (share_artifact), and exit cleanly. Outcome-scored via post-run unittest + CLI smoke commands; todoUpdatedBeforeComplete pins mark-as-you-go, artifactShared pins real delivery (not just a tool-name match).
